Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal: The objective is to create an Accepting Petri Net using the pm4py library for a specific business process scenario Insurance Claim Management. This involves defining places transitions arcs an initial marking start state and a final marking end state. Analyze the Scenario: Activities CR DV FC CA AP P N CL. Loops DV RDS FC II. Conditional Branch CA AP P.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From scenario description recognize activities as transitions states between as places. Decision on Insurance Claim C as trigger not transition start from Claim Registration CR. Standard WF net structure with Start and End places.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the Structure: Propose places p start p after CR p after DV etc. Transitions t CR t DV t RDS etc. Refine loops DV produces to p after DV then split to FC or RDS RDS back to p ready for DV. Similar for FC II.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model choices without guards using split places p after DV to FC or RDS p after FC to CA or II p after CA to AP or direct to P join at p ready for P. Best explanation for OR split join in Petri net.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on loops Refine DV loop p ready for DV to DV to p after DV to FC or RDS RDS to p ready for DV. Correction on example do not remove end place to keep markings valid unlike example cleanup.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From scenario logic deduce arcs p start to t CR t CR to p ready for DV p ready for DV to t DV t DV to p after DV p after DV to t FC and t RDS t RDS to p ready for DV and so on to t CL to p end.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Checking logic Loops allow multiple iterations DV RDS FC II. Branch AP or direct to P with join. Final review matches prompt requirements transitions labeled activities initial final markings defined.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Naming Conventions Use clear names p start p after CR t CR etc. Simplify places where possible chain explicitly for clarity.
